title: Cobblemon: Gotta Ride 'Em All
description: Makes every fully evolved Pokemon rideable for the mod Cobblemon: Ride On!
body:
**I would reccommend instead of this mod to use Cobblemon Rider and find a config file that adds more mounts. This mod is more rough and outdated**


Datapack for [Cobblemon: Ride On!](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-ride-on!) that makes every fully evolved Pokemon rideable. Using the guide for [Cobbleride datapacks](https://gitlab.com/StarliteHeart/cobbleride/-/tree/main/examples/datapacks/README.md) this datapack adds compatibility for every fully evolved pokemon to be rideable with default speed values and player positions.

**Default controls:**
- Jump to ascend, fly and jump!
- Sneak to descend and dive!
- Sprint to sprint!
- Sneak and Throw Selected Pokemon (from Cobblemon) to dismount!
